items.title: AI-Assisted Migration Tool Helps Teams Move from ingress-nginx to Higress in Minutes
items.original_summary: The Cloud Native Computing Foundation has highlighted a new AI-assisted migration approach that enabled engineers to migrate 60 ingress-nginx resources to Higress in roughly 30 minutes, demonstrating how artificial intelligence is increasingly being applied to modernize Kubernetes networking and gateway infrastructure. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CNCF 报告一种 AI 辅助迁移方案，可在约 30 分钟内将 60 个 ingress-nginx 资源迁移到 Higress。这是 Kubernetes 网关迁移的工具/方法论文章，没有涉及 LLM 模型或 OpenAI/Anthropic API。和此前人工 YAML 改造相比，引入了 AI 辅助代码生成步骤。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：评估 Higress 作为 ingress-nginx 替代方案的兼容性；若决定迁移，可在 PR 流程中加入该 AI 迁移脚本做试点，但生产环境仍需人工 review 配置差异。

items.title: Pullfrog AI: Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternative Powered by GitHub Actions
items.original_summary: Pullfrog is an open-source AI-powered GitHub bot by Colin McDonnell, designed for automation in GitHub Actions. It supports a model-agnostic approach, allowing integration with various LLM providers. Key features include orchestration for pull request reviews, issue triage, and CI remediation, all managed within GitHub's environment. The tool operates with a bring-your-own-key model for access. By Daniel Curtis
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道开源 GitHub Bot Pullfrog AI 上线，作为 CodeRabbit 的开源替代品，运行在 GitHub Actions 中并支持 model-agnostic 接入方式。新增 CI 中 PR review、issue triage 与修复编排能力，BYOK 模式使用各家 LLM 密钥。和 CodeRabbit 相比可自托管、可换模型，但需要自行维护 Actions 流水线。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：在 .github/workflows 下部署 Pullfrog Action，按文档配置 OPENAI_API_KEY/ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 等 BYOK 变量；评估是否替换现有 CodeRabbit 订阅，关注 GitHub Actions minutes 用量上限。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft 在 Build 2026 上对 AKS 进行大幅扩展，新增 Bare Metal、Fleet Management 与 AI 基础设施能力，将 Kubernetes 定位为 AI 训练/推理的一等平台。相对此前 AKS 仅支持标准 VM 节点，新增裸金属节点与跨集群 fleet 管理。和 Azure ML 集成进一步加深。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：关注 AKS AI 节点 SKU（GPU/NPU 型号）与 Bare Metal 节点的 GA 时间表；现有 AKS 集群评估是否迁移到 Fleet Manager 做多区域推理调度；配额/quota 与 region 可用性以订阅所在区域为准。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，用于在 Apple Silicon 上完全本地运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，支持 PyTorch 转出的自定义模型与官方预优化开源模型。相对 Core ML 仅做推理，新增原生支持大模型加载与文本生成能力。旧 Core ML 模型需要重新转换才能在 Core AI 中运行。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：iOS/macOS 团队评估把现有 Core ML 模型通过 coremltools 升级到 Core AI 格式；关注预优化模型白名单（含 Llama、Mistral 等开源模型）与最低 OS 版本要求；本地推理需为 max_tokens、context window 做内存预算。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 推出 Chunk Sidecars 能力，把 CI 风格的校验直接嵌入 AI 编码 agent 的内部开发循环。相对此前 AI agent 完成代码后外部触发 CI，新增 agent 运行期间实时调用 CI 校验。和传统 PR 检查流程相比，错误可在 agent 提交前被发现。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：在 .circleci/config.yml 中暴露 sidecar 接口供 AI agent 调用；在 IDE agent（如 Cursor、Claude Code）的 hook 中接入 CircleCI validation API；关注 CircleCI 并发上限与 sidecar 计费是否纳入 credit 消耗。

items.title: Anthropic Releases and Temporarily Suspends Claude Fable 5
items.original_summary: On June 9, 2026, Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, a model designed for long-horizon tasks, but it was taken offline shortly after due to a U.S. government export directive. It shares architecture with Claude Mythos 5, supporting extensive token usage. The model includes mandatory data retention requirements, which have affected its deployment with partners like Microsoft. By Andrew Hoblitzell
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 于 6 月 9 日发布 Claude Fable 5（面向长程任务）但随后因美国政府出口管制指令下线，该模型与 Claude Mythos 5 共享架构并支持大规模 token 使用，包含强制数据保留要求，已影响 Microsoft 等合作伙伴部署。和发布时相比，所有调用方当前不可用。
items.backend_focus: 紧急行动：立即将生产代码 model 字段从 claude-fable-5 切回 Claude Opus 4.7/Sonnet 4.5；在 AWS Bedrock/Azure AI Foundry 上下架 Fable 5 模型部署；检查是否有第三方托管依赖 Fable 5，启用备选模型。

items.title: Article: Understanding ML Model Poisoning: How It Happens and How to Detect It
items.original_summary: In this article, the author explores data poisoning as a threat to machine learning systems, covering techniques such as label flipping, backdoors, clean-label poisoning, and gradient manipulation. The article reviews real-world incidents, discusses the challenges of detecting poisoned data, and presents practical defenses, tools, and operational practices for securing ML training pipelines. By Igor Maljkovic
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 长文介绍 ML 数据投毒攻击的原理与防御，覆盖 label flipping、后门、clean-label 投毒、梯度操纵等手法，并给出训练流水线中的检测与防护实践。属于安全科普类文章，没有发布新工具或新模型。和此前对抗性机器学习综述相比更聚焦数据层威胁。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：在训练数据流水线加入异常标签分布检测与 clean-label 投毒扫描；为外部数据集引入 provenance 校验；对训练任务做对抗性评估；可参考文中工具列表引入到 MLOps 流程。

items.title: Article: Governing AI in the Cloud: a Practical Guide for Architects
items.original_summary: In this article, the author outlines a practical approach to AI governance in the cloud, covering discovery of shadow AI, data classification at creation, IAM-based enforcement, policy-as-code, and operational controls. The article shows how organizations can embed governance into delivery pipelines, balancing security, compliance, and developer productivity without relying on manual processes. By Dave Ward
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 长文给出云上 AI 治理的实操指南，覆盖影子 AI 发现、数据创建时分类、IAM 强制、policy-as-code 与运营控制。和传统云治理相比，新增了对 LLM 调用链路与数据流向的治理维度。文章不涉及具体厂商 API 变化。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：在 CI/CD pipeline 接入 OPA/Conftest 做 AI 资源 policy-as-code；为 LLM API 调用启用独立 IAM role 与 KMS 加密；建立影子 AI 资产发现任务（基于云账单与 DNS 日志）。

items.title: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own
items.original_summary: Stack Overflow has announced Stack Overflow for Agents, a beta API-first knowledge exchange aimed at AI coding agents rather than human developers. The service is presented as a way to close what the company calls the Ephemeral Intelligence Gap, where agents repeatedly rediscover the same fixes and patterns in isolation instead of sharing them through a common memory. By Matt Saunders
items.chinese_summary: Stack Overflow 推出 Stack Overflow for Agents beta 版，一个面向 AI 编码 agent 而非人类开发者的 API-first 知识交换服务，旨在弥合「短暂智能鸿沟」。相对传统 Stack Overflow 的人类问答页面，新增 API 端点供 agent 直接消费。和 Context7、llm-txt 等同类项目功能重叠。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：在 IDE agent 或 CI agent 中接入 Stack Overflow for Agents API（按官方文档获取 API key）；评估是否替代现有的 Context7 MCP server；关注 beta 阶段限流/计费策略。

items.title: Oracle's OpenJDK Bans Generative AI Contributions While Oracle's GraalVM Allows Them
items.original_summary: Two related, Oracle-backed projects published opposing policies on open-source contributions created with generative AI: the OpenJDK Governing Board approved an interim policy prohibiting such contributions, while the Coding Assistants policy from GraalVM permits them. Both projects require contributors to sign the same Oracle Contributor Agreement (OCA) for intellectual property. By Karsten Silz
items.chinese_summary: Oracle 旗下两个开源项目对生成式 AI 贡献态度相反：OpenJDK 管委会通过临时政策禁止生成式 AI 贡献，而 GraalVM 的 Coding Assistants 政策允许此类贡献，两者仍共用 Oracle Contributor Agreement。这是一项治理规则更新，没有涉及 API、SDK 或模型版本变化。
items.backend_focus: 可执行项：向 OpenJDK 提交 patch 时移除任何由 LLM 生成或大幅改写的代码段；GraalVM 贡献保持现有流程，但需在 PR 描述中注明 AI 辅助范围；关注 OCA 是否后续补充 AI 相关条款。
